metadata.title: Why a Prediction You Can Edit Is Worth Nothing

beats.title: Liam cold open — ClaudeComposerAsk
beats.narration_text: The image of an unlocked prediction sliding downhill to meet the outcome until the gap collapses to zero explained why my team's hindsight feels like foresight. I want to build the lock into how we work. Help me: (1) describe a lightweight mechanism that timestamps and freezes a prediction before results arrive; (2) explain why the locked gap is evidence while the edited sentence proves nothing, in information terms; (3) design a scoring rule that rewards our A/B-test predictions only when they were committed beforehand.

props.command: The image of an unlocked prediction sliding downhill to meet the outcome until the gap collapses to zero explained why my team's hindsight feels like foresight. I want to build the lock into how we work. Help me: (1) describe a lightweight mechanism that timestamps and freezes a prediction before results arrive; (2) explain why the locked gap is evidence while the edited sentence proves nothing, in information terms; (3) design a scoring rule that rewards our A/B-test predictions only when they were committed beforehand.
props.segment: Why a Prediction You Can Edit

beats.narration_text: Why a prediction you can edit is worth nothing.

card.copy:
Why a Prediction You Can Edit
Is Worth Nothing

beats.narration_text: After the audit report came out, everyone in the room remembered predicting the exact failure it described. But none of them had written anything down before reading it.
Why does writing down a guess after knowing the answer feel identical to writing it before — and why does one prove nothing while the other is evidence?

props.headline: Why does writing down a guess after knowing the answer feel…

card.copy: Why does writing down a guess after knowing the answer feel identical to writing it before — and why does one prove nothing while the other is evidence?

beats.narration_text: Here is the naive picture: predict, observe, compare. The gap between prediction and outcome is evidence about your model of the world.
But leave the prediction editable, and it flows downhill to meet the outcome — every revision narrows the gap until it collapses to zero, and the evidence disappears.
The lock is what makes the gap durable.

props.headline: The lock is what makes the gap durable.

beats.image_description: A researcher's notebook open on a desk with handwritten predictions dated before an experiment, the date clearly visible, in a laboratory or office setting

beats.narration_text: Draw two markers: your prediction and the outcome. The distance between them is signal — evidence of what your model of the world got right or wrong.
Lock the prediction, and the gap survives to be measured. Leave it unlocked, and the prediction slides to meet the result — the gap closes, and you have learned nothing.
Written before the result, a guess is evidence. Editable after, the identical sentence proves nothing.
When a team never locks their predictions, the gap between prediction and outcome measures editing speed — not understanding. The instrument is broken.
The information lives in the gap. Leave the prediction unlocked and it slides to meet the result.

A product team runs an A/B test. One engineer privately expects two percent improvement. Results arrive: one-point-eight percent. Close enough — everyone agrees their model of the product is working. Six months and three tests later, no one can say whether those predictions were accurate. No record was locked. The gap that was evidence has collapsed to zero every time.
Lock your prediction before you observe. The gap is the evidence.

props.headline: Lock your prediction before you observe. The gap is the evidence.

card.copy: Lock your prediction before you observe.

Leave the prediction unlocked and it slides to meet the result.

beats.title: Your turn handoff — ClaudeComposerAsk
beats.narration_text: Take this prompt, run it on your own — pick any cancer type or clinical scenario you know about and ask how this mechanism applies there.
